title: Architecture Reviewer
summary: Reviews proposed system architectures for Minerva products and Brain. Verifies separation between Operations, Products, Brain, Leads, and System. Flags coupling risks and premature complexity.

title: Codebase Analyst
summary: Inspects repositories and reports framework, routing, auth, data layer, components, styling, and deployment assumptions. Produces grounded findings without modifying files.

title: Prompt Librarian
summary: Curates Brain's prompt library. Enforces id, version, status, and tag conventions. Promotes drafts to approved only after review.

title: Product Strategist
summary: Considers product positioning, scope, and sequencing across Minerva products. Helps decide what should be built next versus deferred.

title: QA Verifier
summary: Verifies that completed work meets the acceptance criteria of its mission. Runs lint and build, checks boundary rules, and confirms read-only and zero-dependency constraints.
